title: Fix Tooltip Capitalization — 'Salesforce' Not Capitalized in Report/Dashboard Icon
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the tooltip for the report/dashboard icon to correctly capitalize 'Salesforce', so the branding is consistent.
description: Bug fix: the tooltip on the report/dashboard Salesforce icon had 'salesforce' in lowercase. Fixed to use proper capitalization 'Salesforce'.
acceptance_criteria: Branding is consistent across all tooltips
ux_changes: Fixed tooltip text to capitalize 'Salesforce' correctly.
implementation_notes: Simple text fix in the tooltip attribute.
